rows.label: xs33670100_MSG0010
rows.name:
This is[ST:wide ]— a discovery on a scale
that will turn cosmic history upside down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33670100_MSG0020
rows.name: To think that in a place like this,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33670100_MSG0030
rows.name:
I would be able to see genuine ruins
of Ancient Samaar![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33670100_MSG0040
rows.name:
And this mysterious space[ST:wide ]—
Could it be a part of the rift between worlds?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33670100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Ahh, there are so many things I want to know!
Anyway, I have to investigate as much as possible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33670100_MSG0060
rows.name:
Come on, let's go!
An opportunity like this will never come again![ST:wait ]
